General.Name: Putian Communication Group Ltd
General.Description: Putian Communication Group Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and produces data and communications cables and structured cabling system product under the Hanphy brand name in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, and internationally. It offers optical fibers and optical fiber cables and data and communications cables for telecommunications network operators for network construction and maintenance; structured cabling system products, such as optical and copper jumper wires and connection; distribution components, including distribution frames, wiring closets, data and audio modules, and faceplates. The company was founded in 2001 and is based in Nanchang, the People's Republic of China.

3.Name: Ms. Zhi  Zhou
3.Title: Chief Business Officer of Business Center
